report_summary: Synthetic pre-open research draft summarizing forecast horizons, uncertainty, and review requirements.

per_stock_summary.summary: Synthetic research-only summary preserving same-day, next-day, one-month, and three-month forecast context.

forecast_explanation.same_day_high_low: Explain interval bounds and confidence without implying certainty.
forecast_explanation.next_day_high_low: Explain next-day range as a research forecast requiring later review.
forecast_explanation.one_month_trend: Explain trend scenario with base, bull, and bear context.
forecast_explanation.three_month_trend: Explain longer-horizon uncertainty and evidence limits.

risk_summary: Forecasts require evidence review and post-close evaluation.
No trading or order instruction is provided.
confidence_disclaimer: Confidence values are research estimates with uncertainty and must be reviewed against actual outcomes.
dashboard_detail_text: Dashboard draft may include full evidence, forecast horizon details, risk flags, and review due dates for operator review.
email_detail_text: Email draft may include full daily report detail after separate sender approval; this template does not send email.
line_reminder_text: Daily research draft ready for review; open Dashboard or Email draft for details.
